action.reasoning: Observation: The pre-trained MetricGAN+ model achieved a PESQ of 3.134. Analysis: This is a very strong baseline, as MetricGAN+ is specifically optimized for PESQ and achieves state-of-the-art results on VoiceBank+DEMAND. Training a model from scratch to beat this in under 6 hours without network access is highly unlikely. Before concluding the experiment, I will search the local filesystem for any other pre-trained models (e.g., in asteroid or torchaudio caches) that might have been pre-downloaded and could potentially offer a higher score or be ensembled.
action.command: find / -type f \( -name "*.pt" -o -name "*.pth" -o -name "*.bin" -o -name "*.ckpt" \) 2>/dev/null | grep -v "/proc" | grep -v "/sys" | grep -v "/usr/local/lib" | grep -v "/opt/conda"
